lead_profile_text: STL Switch — 2 bed apartment, Mowbray House, Harrogate HG1. Trial unit in a 19-apartment block with portfolio expansion potential. Converted at 13% management fee, signed before 18 March 2026. Fast-path conversion with no major objections.
emotional_profile: Growth-oriented portfolio investor; responded strongly to income projections and scale-up potential; decisive — converted in a single web meeting

top_questions.text: What income can I expect from the Harrogate property?
top_questions.answer: Concrete financial projections presented — Harrogate market is strong for STL

top_questions.text: How does the booking strategy work across platforms?
top_questions.answer: Full strategy: Airbnb, Booking.com and direct bookings explained

top_questions.text: What is the potential for scaling across the whole block?
top_questions.answer: Portfolio expansion potential across all 19 apartments in Mowbray House outlined

what_moved_them: Harrogate market strength — income projections clearly resonated
Portfolio scale-up potential across 19-unit block was a strong motivator
Full booking strategy including Airbnb, Booking.com and direct bookings
Photography, listing optimisation and platform performance included in service
offer_framing: 13% management fee incentive rate — framed as trial unit opportunity with clear portfolio expansion pathway across 19-apartment block
zac_income_intro: Concrete financial projections for Harrogate market presented at meeting
